ul.li: Resolution: ~0.5µs to 1.0µs depending on GPU architecture (Pascal+).
Clock Source: Global Device nanosecond timer; unaffected by CPU frequency scaling.
Overhead: cudaEventRecord is a non-blocking asynchronous call on the host.
Stream Consistency: Events are recorded in-order within the specified stream.

g.text: Dashed Line: Asynchronous Hardware Return / Logic

ol.li: Retrieve latched hardware ticks: T0, T1
